title: 151 2724656750987 00405-12 SEALANT, White
features: READY TO USE: 151 Instant Filler, ready to use, no shrinkage, sagging or cracking after use. Ideal for indoor and outdoor repairs.
QUICK DRY, SMOOTH FINISH: 151 Instant Filler, sand down plaster, plasterboard, brick wood or stone, remove dust and debris, fill with 151 Instant Filler. It will dry quickly, white and smooth.
INDOOR & OUTDOOR USE: 151 Instant Filler, suitable for a wide range of indoor and outdoor repairs. Always ensure area is clean and dry before applying. Sand after filler is dry if required.
CRACKS, GAPS & HOLES: 151 Instant Filler, use around the home indoors and out to repair cracks, fill holes and gaps.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use, re-sealable instant filler 180ml. Store at room temperature.
description: Product Description 151Instant Filler, ready to use, no shrinkage, sagging or cracking after use. Ideal for indoor and outdoor repairs. Sand down plaster, plasterboard, brick wood or stone, remove dust and debris, fill with 151Instant Filler,it will dry quickly, white and smooth. Suitable for a wide range of indoor and outdoor repairs. Always ensure area is clean and dry before applying. Sand after filler is dry & paint if required. Ready to use, re-sealable instant filler 180ml. Store at room temperature Manufacturer Contact Information 151 Instant Filler (180ml) 330g
